title: To My friends
content:
These are songs of the Friends I neglected, 
And the Foes, too, in part;
These are songs that were mostly rejected, 
But songs from my heart.

Yours truly,
Henry Lawson.

Sydney, 19/9/1910
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Henry Lawson delivers a powerful performance in "To My friends"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
